content.full_text:
Memorandum

March 15, 1983

TO: File
FROM: Bob Leidigh
RE: T-83-052

I advised Mr. Alperin that the following list of Los Angeles City officials were included within the meaning of "high-ranking" officials and the tickets would be considered part of their compensation and hence not gifts: City Engineer; Mayor; Deputy Mayor (2); Park Commission members; Chief of Police; Assistant Chiefs of Police; General Manager of the Building and Safety Department. Each enumerated official has duties which relate to the Coliseum and is high in rank. While the list may not be exhaustive, it is representative of the type of officials which qualify. Janitors and police patrol persons would not qualify for the exemption since such "perks" are not normally dispensed to such lower level officials. Then again, such gifts to them would probably not trigger disclosure or disqualification.

REL: km
